deals.title: Borregas Property
deals.notes: Land development opportunity. Chris walking away, signs picked up. Isaac Linares development interest did not progress. No path forward.

logs.m: Listing canceled. Signs retrieved. Deal terminated.
Isaac discussed $150K development offer for mobile homes. Sisters enthusiastic but project contingent on funding.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Residential listing terminated by mutual agreement. Matt and Chandler moving back in to make updates and repairs, then relist. Underwater approximately $93K-$143K. Three paths were presented: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close.

logs.m: Listing terminated. Matt and Chandler moving back in. Plan to relist after updates.
Honest conversation held. Chandler was laid off. Short sale leaning option. Relationship intact.
Where Things Stand email sent. Full market analysis presented. Three options outlined.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA residential listing. Listed May 14. Multiple showings ongoing. Second-look buyers favorite property. June relocation deadline. Hairline foundation crack noted. Loan payoff discrepancy flagged ($170K vs $192K stated/public records).
deals.next: Follow up on second-look buyers. Monitor for backup offers.

logs.m: Multiple interested buyers all in early search phase. Second-look buyers returning as favorite. Decisions expected in 1-2 weeks.
Second-look buyers came back for second showing. Favorite property. Walk-in closet noted as slightly small. Pre-inspection report offered.
MLS live. First showing at 9:15am. Cultural feng shui concern raised about street direction.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres. VA renovation loan purchase. Divorce situation, must sell. Payoff approximately $257K. Thin market - 3 comps in 10 miles. Recommended list price $295K. Contractor opportunity for Colton at 181 CR 7751.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule professional photos.

logs.m: Met at property ~10am. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 17. CMA pulled - thin market, 3 comps in 10 miles.
Prior clients going through divorce. Need to finish renovation and sell. Colton looking for contractor work.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Contract with Espinoza family at $113K. Buyer's agent Javier handling TXR 1903 amendment. EMD not yet received. Hunting feeders, blinds, conex included. Steve completed clearing work.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email domain.

logs.m: Steve called back. Alejandra sent new T-47 via DocuSign. Steve completed and returned. Awaiting notary confirmation.
New qualified buyers Espinoza family. Javier is buyer's agent. Amendment sent for third party financing update.
Clearing complete. Steve finished job and sent photos. Drone footage flagged as marketing priority.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Priority Bank foreclosure. Major cleanup underway. Electric reconnected. Flooring this week. Water meter pending. HouzzPro/Matt Toney contractor. Police reports stalled. Cameras installed. Drywall near complete.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD for status. Replace camera batteries. Confirm work completion timeline. Submit listing agreement to bank.

logs.m: Property visited. 3 cameras installed, fully covered. Electricians reconnected pole to meter. Flooring starts this week. Baseboards after flooring. Water meter 1-2 days.
Drywall crew actively patching remaining holes. Sent photos to Kelly. Mileage approved - ACH processing soon.
Work officially started. Dumpsters running since Saturday. Matt Toney contractor confirmed.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale, cash transaction $152K. Lien blocker resolved via Fernando Castillo signature. Chicago Title - Alyssa Castillo. Cleared and funded April 26. Officially closed April 27.
deals.next: Confirm commission received. Deliver Joy gift basket. Thank you notes pending.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Joy gift delivery, rug, and trolley still pending.
Cleared and funded. Transaction complete.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at notary. Delivered to Chicago Title. Joy signed at UPS Store.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Out of Corpus Christi deal. Pivoting to new construction with no HOA requirement. Evaluating 301 W Saxet wholesale deal via Isaac Linares at $85K with FHA 203(k). Pre-approval approximately $122K with Zach Schaphorst. Out of deal as of June 1 - too much scope. Still actively searching.
leads.next: Follow up on new construction search. Revisit builder options if Saxet falls through.

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal. Too much for them. Still actively searching.
Isaac brought 301 W Saxet wholesale at $85K. FHA 203(k) angle. Mike connected with Isaac directly.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing contact. Helping with Green Bliss rental setup (8527). His mom Milagros is new construction buyer candidate. Budget $50K down, target ~$1000/month payment. Buyer rep agreement sent to Milagros. Multiple builder options being pulled.
leads.next: Confirm builder visit with Brandon and Milagros. Register as buyer's agent before first builder visit. Get updated payoff on Green Bliss property.

logs.m: Jimbo backed out of rental arrangement. Chris sent $500. Relationship maintained professionally.
MI Homes option from Frank still in play. Need to follow up with Milagros on timeline.

leads.title: Colton Brown

leads.next: Get updated payoff letter. Confirm listing agreement ready. Schedule photos. Discuss contractor opportunity with Colton.

logs.m: CMA completed and presented. Net sheet built. Payoff verified at $255,578 as of Feb 17.

leads.title: Isaac Linares
leads.detail: Active investor and deal partner. Brought Mill Path listing referral and 301 W Saxet wholesale. Mobile home development concept on Borregas property. Discussed partner potential (Adam) and wholesaling collaboration. Interested in multiple deal angles.
leads.next: Continue deal flow collaboration. Update on new opportunities.

logs.m: Active partner on multiple deal types. Mobile home and wholesale angles in play.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through Little Red House garden network. Grief healing through plants story. Content collaboration potential (with permission). Real estate potential long-term trust-based.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share story. Nurture relationship without rush on real estate.

logs.m: Community connection made. Healing through gardens angle noted. Content collaboration potential.

leads.title: Bryce (Dumpster Contractor)
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military, VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area. Strong buying power with VA benefits.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

logs.m: Met on-site. Wife active military, recently moved from Ohio. Renting and looking to buy.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent in Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in fixer property - unique situation. Details pending. Strong relationship to develop.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome for full buyer and property details. Identify matching inventory.

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome. Details on buyer and fixer property situation pending.

leads.title: Jahsia
leads.detail: 18 years old, finishing senior year. Interested in real estate. Referred by Julie (veteran buyer lead). Check-in text sent regarding Skool website. Worth conversation about licensing path and eXp opportunity.
leads.next: Await response to check-in text. Reach out with licensing info and eXp opportunity details.

logs.m: Check-in text sent. Awaiting response on Skool website engagement.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor - Son
leads.detail: Neighbor behind Miss Pat may have passed away. Son now owns house. Avid gardener - hung plants on fence. Probate or inherited property situation. Son has not been contacted yet. Garden community connection is natural angle.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat - son name and contact. Reach out sensitively through community connection angle.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor situation. Son may not know what to do with inherited property.

leads.title: Armando
leads.detail: Referred by David Roth. Employee buyer program candidate. Budget $50K down, target ~$1000/month payment. Not committed to specific neighborhood or builder. Open to multiple options. No aging commissions on employee purchase route.
leads.next: Get Armando contact info from David Roth. Pull new construction options across builders. Register as buyer's agent before visits.

logs.m: Confirmed no aging commissions if employee purchase route. Incentive stack changes the numbers.
